error403.title: Access Denied

rootFurther.intro:
Facing the storm-like changes of the AI era and ever-increasing demands from clients, Sun* has chosen a strategy of diversifying capabilities — not just striving to be an elite in its field, but aiming higher, where every Sunner is a "problem-solver" — an expert in tackling any challenge, finding solutions for every project, client, and society.
Inspired by diverse capabilities, flexible development, and the spirit of digging deep to break through in the AI era, "Root Further" was chosen as the official theme of the Sun* Annual Awards 2025.
Beyond its surface meaning, "Root Further" represents our journey of constantly reaching further, rooting deeper, touching the hidden "geological layers" to continue existing, rising, and nurturing the passion for value creation that burns bright in every Sun* member.
rootFurther.quote: "A tree with deep roots fears no storm"
rootFurther.conclusion:
Before the storm, only trees with strong enough roots can stand firm. An organization with individuals who are confident in their diverse capabilities, ready to create and embrace challenges, and take charge of change — that is an organization that not only stands firm through turbulence but also leverages every advantage to conquer the challenges of our time.
No one knows what hidden "geological layers" lie deep within the technology industry and modern markets. What we do know is that when "Root Further" becomes our rooted spirit, we will not fear — instead, we will feel excited about any uncharted territory on the journey ahead. Because we always believe that within those infinite horizons, extraordinary wonders and opportunities await us.

kudos.label: Recognition Movement
kudos.title: Sun* Kudos
kudos.description:
NEW IN SAA 2025
The activity of recognizing and thanking colleagues — held for the first time for all Sunners. Deployed in November 2025, encouraging Sun* members to share recognition and thanks through the organizer's system. This will serve as material for the Heads Council when selecting award recipients.

awardsPage.title: SAA 2025 Awards System
awardsPage.metaDescription: The complete Sun* Annual Awards 2025 catalogue: Top Talent, Top Project, Top Project Leader, Best Manager, Signature 2025 – Creator, and MVP.

topTalent.description: The Top Talent award honors exceptional all-around individuals — those who consistently demonstrate solid expertise, outstanding work performance, and deliver value beyond expectations, highly regarded by clients and teammates. With a readiness to take on any task the organization entrusts to them, they inspire, drive motivation, and create a positive impact on the entire team.

topProject.description: The Top Project award honors projects that excel on every front — outstanding revenue, high practical value for clients and the organization. A winning project is recognized not only by its final results but also by its professional execution, spirit of innovation, and ability to overcome challenges.

topProjectLeader.description: The Top Project Leader award honors outstanding project managers — those who drive projects to breakthroughs, inspire their teams, make sound decisions in tough situations, and foster a cohesive, productive work environment.

bestManager.description: The Best Manager award honors managers with exceptional ability to lead teams, develop people, and deliver impressive business results. They stand as examples of dedication, responsibility, and effective leadership.

signature2025.description: The Signature 2025 – Creator award honors individuals or teams with exceptional creativity, delivering products, services, or ideas that break new ground in 2025. This is a special recognition of the relentless spirit of innovation at Sun*.

mvp.description: The MVP (Most Valuable Person) award honors the individual who contributed the most value of the year — whose presence, effort, and results created major impact across the organization. This is the highest honor for an individual in the SAA 2025 awards system.

kudos.title: Sun* Kudos
kudos.description:
NEW IN SAA 2025
The activity of recognizing and thanking colleagues — held for the first time for all Sunners. Deployed in November 2025, encouraging Sun* members to share recognition and thanks through the organizer's system.

writeKudo.title: Send thanks and recognition to your teammate

title.label: Title
title.placeholder: Award a title to your teammate
title.hint:
e.g. A person who inspires me.
The title appears as the Kudo headline.

body.placeholder: Share your thanks and recognition with your teammate here!
body.mentionHint: Type "@ + name" to mention a colleague

anonymous.aliasPlaceholder: Enter the display name to show when sending anonymously

actions.communityStandardsAria: Open community standards in a new tab

toasts.draftStale: Some draft entries are no longer available and were removed

recipient.self: You cannot send a Kudo to yourself

title.required: Please choose or create a title
title.length: Title must be between 2 and 60 characters

hashtag.required: Choose or create at least 1 hashtag
hashtag.charset: Hashtag: letters, digits, and underscore only, up to 32 characters
